snippets.snippet: They will help you out if you need anything.

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.6/10 on cleanliness

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Pets may not be left unattended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I would highly recommend coco jungle for the pool, the food, the location and the wonderful family running it. And although the rooms are simple, they are a bargain. If you're not sure about staying here, just do it, you won't be disappointed. And don't miss the local beach, one of the most beautiful beaches in the island.
comments.reviewTitle: A great family with a very unique piece of paradise

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Not the most convenient location for exploring the island, so you need to either rent a vehicle or have someone take you places (which is what I did). Not a lot of shops and restaurants nearby. But it was so nice just being there, and Philippe’s son drove me up to Ipoih when I wanted to go snorkeling.
comments.reviewPositives: Very peaceful and quiet. A whole private bungalow at a very good price, with a lovely view over the trees and across the water to neighboring islands. Good ac and functional wifi. Swimming pool and covered patio for hanging out. The owners are very friendly and helpful and they create a real family atmosphere. Excellent and varied food, and can even get a beer in an area where it’s not easy to find.
comments.reviewTitle: A genuine, nontouristic, family experience in comfortable surroundings at a very good price. Highly recommended.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room and accommodation area are clean, the room facilities are complete, the food is delicious, the owner is friendly, the beach is close and very beautiful, please prove it yourself.
comments.originalComment: Kamar dan area penginapan bersih, fasilitas kamar lengkap, makanan enak, owner-nya ramah, pantai dekat dan sangat indah, silakan anda buktikan sendiri

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: We had a very peaceful stay at Coco Jungle. Our hosts were very knowledgeable and accommodating. They have a beautiful variety of nature to enjoy on the grounds including some beautiful flowers, and there are several delicious meal options available for vegetarians! 😋 The pool and club house add to the relaxing atmosphere, and our hosts were very kind. Also, the beach is less then a 10 minute walk from Coco Jungle. We look forward to staying again very soon!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Un excelente lugar donde descansar. Tanto Jeanphi, como Rizza y Marley harán lo posible por que te sientas como en casa. Respetaron mucha nuestra privacidad. Hubo una comunicación muy buena desde el primer día. Pueden rentar scooter aquí también. No sé pierdan de probar sus comidas que son exquisitas!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Нам очень понравилось, спокойное тихое место. Отличный wifi, заказывали ужин, вкусно и недорого. Очень душевный хозяин Филипп, предоставил скутер в аренду, подсказал красивые места.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
Rien 
Certains trouveront excentré des activités mais avec un scooter rien n’est loin et le trajet est très agréable, cela permet de découvrir le paysage
comments.reviewPositives: Jean Philippe et Reza sont adorables, très présents et disponibles. Les repas sont excellents et change du nasi ou mie goreng habituel. L’ambiance est familiale et calme, on s’y sent comme à la maison. La vue est très belle depuis le roof top sur la mère . Parfait pour se reposer.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Pas véhiculée, me sentais un peu isolée
comments.reviewPositives:
Vue sur la forêt et l’océan 
Excellent repas et breakfast
